mapper.select: SELECT C.CUST_ID AS custId, C.STATUS AS status, C.CUST_NAME AS custName, C.REP_NAME AS repName, C.CUST_TYPE AS custType, C.CUST_KIND AS custKind, C.SSN_ENC AS ssnEnc, C.BIZ_NO AS bizNo, C.CORP_NO AS corpNo, C.FOREIGNER_REG_NO AS foreignerRegNo, C.ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, C.ADDR AS addr, C.ADDR_DETAIL AS addrDetail, C.TEL_NO AS telNo, C.HP_NO AS hpNo, C.HP_CARRIER AS hpCarrier, C.EMAIL AS email, C.CUST_AUTH_TYPE AS custAuthType, C.CUST_AUTH_VAL AS custAuthVal, C.COUNSELOR_NAME AS counselorName, C.DEPT_ID AS deptId, C.ASSIGNED_USER_ID AS assignedUserId, C.REMARK AS remark, C.VOUCHER_RETURN_YN AS voucherReturnYn, C.INSTALL_SCHED_DT AS installSchedDt, C.OPEN_DATE AS openDate, C.RECEIPT_DT AS receiptDate, C.CANCELL_DT AS cancellationDate, C.JOIN_DATE AS authenticatedDate, C.USE_YN AS useYn, C.CREATOR_ID AS creatorId, C.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, C.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM TB_CUSTOMER C WHERE C.CUST_ID = #{custId} AND C.USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_CUSTOMER SET STATUS = #{status}, CUST_NAME = #{custName}, REP_NAME = #{repName}, CUST_TYPE = #{custType}, CUST_KIND = COALESCE(#{custKind}, 'INDIVIDUAL'), SSN_ENC = #{ssnEnc}, BIZ_NO = #{bizNo}, CORP_NO = #{corpNo}, FOREIGNER_REG_NO = #{foreignerRegNo}, ZIP_CODE = #{zipCode}, ADDR = #{addr}, ADDR_DETAIL = #{addrDetail}, TEL_NO = #{telNo}, HP_NO = #{hpNo}, HP_CARRIER = #{hpCarrier}, EMAIL = #{email}, CUST_AUTH_TYPE = #{custAuthType}, CUST_AUTH_VAL = #{custAuthVal}, COUNSELOR_NAME = #{counselorName}, DEPT_ID = #{deptId}, ASSIGNED_USER_ID = #{assignedUserId}, REMARK = #{remark}, VOUCHER_RETURN_YN = COALESCE(#{voucherReturnYn}, 'N'), INSTALL_SCHED_DT = #{installSchedDt}, OPEN_DATE = #{openDate}, RECEIPT_DT = #{receiptDate}, CANCELL_DT = #{cancellationDate}, JOIN_DATE = #{authenticatedDate}, USE_YN = COALESCE(#{useYn}, 'Y'), UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE CUST_ID = #{custId}
UPDATE TB_CUSTOMER SET VOUCHER_RETURN_YN = #{voucherReturnYn}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE CUST_ID = #{custId}
mapper.select: SELECT PROD_ID AS prodId, CUST_ID AS custId, COMP_NAME AS compName, PROD_GB AS prodGb, REGION_NAME AS regionName, SUBSCRIPTION_NO AS subscription_no, PROD_NAME AS prodName, PROD_OPT AS prodOpt, CONTRACT_PERIOD AS contractPeriod, STB_TYPE AS stbType, VAS_NAME AS vasName, LINE_COUNT AS lineCount, OPEN_DATE AS openDate, CANCEL_DATE AS cancelDate, OPEN_STATUS AS openStatus, REMARK AS remark, USE_YN AS useYn, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM TB_CUST_PRODUCT WHERE CUST_ID = #{custId} AND (USE_YN IS NULL OR USE_YN = 'Y') ORDER BY PROD_ID

SELECT CUST_ID AS custId, PAY_METHOD AS payMethod, DISCOUNT_TYPE AS discountType, BILL_TYPE AS billType, BANK_CARD_NAME AS bankCardName, ACCOUNT_CARD_NO AS accountCardNo, ACCOUNT_HOLDER AS accountHolder, RELATION_WITH_CUST AS relationWithCust, HOLDER_SSN_ENC AS holderSsnEnc, IS_SAME_AS_CUST AS isSameAsCust, REMARK AS remark, USE_YN AS useYn, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM TB_CUST_PAYMENT WHERE CUST_ID = #{custId}

SELECT CUST_ID AS custId, GIFT_GB AS giftGb, GIFT_NAME AS giftName, GIFT_AMOUNT AS giftAmount, ADD_DEPOSIT_AMOUNT AS addDepositAmount, PAY_SCHED_DATE AS paySchedDate, PAY_DONE_DATE AS payDoneDate, PAY_SOURCE AS paySource, BANK_NAME AS bankName, ACCOUNT_NO AS accountNo, ACCOUNT_HOLDER AS accountHolder, HOLDER_SSN_ENC AS holderSsnEnc, IS_SAME_AS_BANK AS isSameAsBank, REMARK AS remark, USE_YN AS useYn, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM TB_CUST_GIFT WHERE CUST_ID = #{custId} AND (USE_YN IS NULL OR USE_YN = 'Y') ORDER BY GIFT_ID

SELECT CUST_ID AS custId, IS_SAME_AS_CUST AS isSameAsCust, MNP_TEL_NO AS mnpTelNo, OWNER_NAME AS ownerName, OWNER_SSN_ENC AS ownerSsnEnc, CONTACT_NO AS contactNo, ISSUE_DATE AS issueDate, PREV_CARRIER AS prevCarrier, MNP_MEMO AS mnpMemo, REMARK AS remark, USE_YN AS useYn, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM TB_CUST_MNP WHERE CUST_ID = #{custId} AND (USE_YN IS NULL OR USE_YN = 'Y') ORDER BY MNP_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_CUST_PAYMENT (CUST_ID, PAY_METHOD, DISCOUNT_TYPE, BILL_TYPE, BANK_CARD_NAME, ACCOUNT_CARD_NO, ACCOUNT_HOLDER, RELATION_WITH_CUST, HOLDER_SSN_ENC, IS_SAME_AS_CUST, REMARK, USE_YN) VALUES (#{custId}, #{payMethod}, #{discountType}, #{billType}, #{bankCardName}, #{accountCardNo}, #{accountHolder}, #{relationWithCust}, #{holderSsnEnc}, COALESCE(#{isSameAsCust}, 'N'), #{remark}, COALESCE(#{useYn}, 'Y'))

INSERT INTO TB_CUST_GIFT (CUST_ID, GIFT_GB, GIFT_NAME, GIFT_AMOUNT, ADD_DEPOSIT_AMOUNT, PAY_SCHED_DATE, PAY_DONE_DATE, PAY_SOURCE, BANK_NAME, ACCOUNT_NO, ACCOUNT_HOLDER, HOLDER_SSN_ENC, IS_SAME_AS_BANK, REMARK, USE_YN) VALUES (#{custId}, #{giftGb}, #{giftName}, COALESCE(#{giftAmount}, 0), COALESCE(#{addDepositAmount}, 0), #{paySchedDate}, #{payDoneDate}, #{paySource}, #{bankName}, #{accountNo}, #{accountHolder}, #{holderSsnEnc}, COALESCE(#{isSameAsBank}, 'N'), #{remark}, COALESCE(#{useYn}, 'Y'))

INSERT INTO TB_CUST_PRODUCT (CUST_ID, COMP_NAME, PROD_GB, REGION_NAME, SUBSCRIPTION_NO, PROD_NAME, PROD_OPT, CONTRACT_PERIOD, STB_TYPE, VAS_NAME, LINE_COUNT, OPEN_DATE, CANCEL_DATE, OPEN_STATUS, REMARK, USE_YN) VALUES (#{custId}, #{compName}, #{prodGb}, #{regionName}, #{subscriptionNo}, #{prodName}, #{prodOpt}, #{contractPeriod}, #{stbType}, #{vasName}, COALESCE(#{lineCount}, 1), #{openDate}, #{cancelDate}, COALESCE(#{openStatus}, 'RECEIPT'), #{remark}, 'Y')

INSERT INTO TB_CUST_MNP (CUST_ID, IS_SAME_AS_CUST, MNP_TEL_NO, OWNER_NAME, OWNER_SSN_ENC, CONTACT_NO, ISSUE_DATE, PREV_CARRIER, MNP_MEMO, REMARK, USE_YN) VALUES (#{custId}, COALESCE(#{isSameAsCust}, 'N'), #{mnpTelNo}, #{ownerName}, #{ownerSsnEnc}, #{contactNo}, #{issueDate}, #{prevCarrier}, #{mnpMemo}, #{remark}, COALESCE(#{useYn}, 'Y'))
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_CUST_PRODUCT SET SUBSCRIPTION_NO = #{value}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE CUST_ID = #{custId} AND PROD_GB = 'GENERAL' LIMIT 1
UPDATE TB_CUST_PRODUCT SET OPEN_DATE = #{value}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE CUST_ID = #{custId} AND (USE_YN IS NULL OR USE_YN = 'Y') ORDER BY PROD_ID ASC LIMIT 1
UPDATE TB_CUST_PRODUCT SET OPEN_STATUS = #{value}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE CUST_ID = #{custId} AND (USE_YN IS NULL OR USE_YN = 'Y') ORDER BY PROD_ID ASC LIMIT 1
UPDATE TB_CUST_GIFT SET PAY_DONE_DATE = #{value}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE CUST_ID = #{custId} AND GIFT_GB = 'GENERAL' LIMIT 1
